title: Carbon Fund ETF Quarterly Trend Sheet - Q3 2025
content:
Carbon ETFs Market Recorded Steady Gains in Q3 2025 as Key Funds Strengthened

The carbon ETF market recorded a clear recovery in Q3 2025, getting closer to Q4 2024 levels. Total AUM for all tracked ETFs increased from $566M in Q2 2025 to $620M in Q3 2025, which reflects a 10% quarter-over-quarter (QoQ) rise. The improvement was supported by stronger price action in major carbon markets and renewed investor participation after a muted first half of the year.
author: Parmeet Singh
